## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --test tests/*.test.mjs` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated a test for parsing or job/state changes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (Node built-ins only)
- [ ] Honored the verified `cursor-agent` contract (`--trust`, success = exit 0 && `is_error !== true`, read-only = `--mode ask`)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (and bumped versions together if releasing)
